title: Meta layoffs: Which teams in India were hit hardest in the latest AI-led restructuring?
description: Meta has reportedly expanded its global restructuring into India, impacting product teams, ad sales and marketing roles as the company shifts aggressively towards AI-focused operations. Nearly 8,000 employees worldwide are believed to have been affected as Meta reorganises teams, cuts hierarchy layers and pours billions into artificial intelligence infrastructure.
content: Meta recently implemented its latest wave of layoffs, cutting around 8,000 jobs globally in one of the company’s biggest restructuring drives tied to artificial intelligence so far. This layoff has affected around 10 per cent of Meta’s worldwide forc... [4353 chars]

title: AI wildfire detection cameras could come to Eau Claire County
description: Artificial intelligence is now being used to help detect wildfires, and local officials are hoping to bring this tool to Eau Claire.
content: EAU CLAIRE, Wis. (WEAU) - Artificial intelligence is now being used to help detect wildfires, and local officials hope to bring this tool to Eau Claire. Xcel Energy is considering installing two Pano AI cameras between Eau Claire and Osseo to spot sm... [2258 chars]

title: PDS scheme with Rs 25,530 cr outlay to modernise food distribution system
description: The Central government on Wednesday announced the SARTHAK-PDS scheme with a total outlay of Rs 25,530 crore aimed at modernising the Public Distribution System (PDS), improving logistics and introducing artificial intelligence-based systems for beneficiary management and grievance redressal.

title: Canadians may ask AI for medical advice but don't want it replacing humans, poll suggests
description: A new poll on artificial intelligence and health care suggests that while some Canadians may be turning to chatbots for medical advice, they're far less comfortable with the technology being used to make medical decisions or replace a visit with a doctor.
content:

title: Nurse Convicted in Patient’s Death Turns Fatal Drug Error Into a Cautionary Tale
description: RaDonda Vaught was convicted of negligent homicide for accidentally dispensing a deadly drug to a patient. She now gives speeches about hospital safety in an era of automation and artificial intelligence.
content:

title: The $1 trillion club gets new members: SK Hynix and Micron, thanks to AI boom
description: The market caps of chipmakers SK Hynix and Micron have risen above the $1 trillion mark, for the first time, driven by a boom in artificial intelligence (AI) data centres.
content:
Exponential demand for AI data centres has led to a global memory shortage that chipmakers such as Micron are struggling to meet, allowing Micron, SK Hynix, and Samsung to raise prices. Micron’s stock has more than tripled year to date.

title: Meta India Reduces Roles in Ad Sales & Marketing as AI Focus Expands Globally
description: Meta India has cut a limited number of roles across teams amid global restructuring. The company is also shifting focus towards artificial intelligence driven operations and efficiency.
content:
Meta India has reportedly reduced a limited number of positions across ad sales, marketing and individual contributor roles as part of its ongoing internal restructuring linked to its artificial intelligence (AI) shift.

title: BI mother-daughter duo launches new AI tool to help organizations
description: Seattle area-based Convexus, co-founded by mother-daughter duo Merrill and Doña Keating of Bainbridge Island, has launched a collaborative civic tech platform that aims to use Artificial Intelligence (AI) to help organizations facilitate dialogue and reduce fragmented conversations.
